title: Deep Code 开源 AI 编程助手上线，专为 DeepSeek-V4 模型适配
content: DeepSeek's official API documentation has added Deep Code, an open-source terminal AI coding assistant optimized for DeepSeek-V4 models. Launched in May and now at v0.1.31, it supports VS Code plugins and CLI mode. Built on an agent architecture, it emphasizes continuous collaboration by retaining session context, enabling file reading, code modification, and command execution. It offers advanced features like deep thinking and reasoning intensity control tailored to DeepSeek-V4. While designed for DeepSeek models, it can also connect to compatible OpenAI-interface deployments.

title: 知名经济学家高善文去世，享年 55 岁，他有哪些重要的经济学观点？
content: Chinese economist Gao Shanwen died at age 55. He held degrees from Peking University and Tsinghua's Five Harbor School of Finance, and authored books including "At the Turning Point of the Cycle" and "Perspective on Prosperity." He worked at the People's Bank of China, then served as chief economist at Everbright Securities from 2003 and at Essence Securities (later Guotai Securities) from 2007 until November 2025.

title: 揭秘字节 Seedance：中国第一台大模型印钞机启动了 | 深氪
content: ByteDance's Seedance 2.0 video generation model, led by young researcher Zeng Yan, became the company's first AI model to achieve dominant market leadership and substantial profitability. Despite initial internal skepticism about scaling to 200B parameters, Zeng's insistence on larger model size and richer training data proved correct. Seedance 2.0 now contributes over half of Volcano Engine's MaaS revenue, with estimated gross margins of 70-90%. Its success stems from superior data quality—using cinematic resources rather than Douyin data—and strong execution by a focused team. The model powers a commercial flywheel: AI short dramas created with Seedance drive content to Redguo and Douyin, generating advertising revenue while fueling Volcano Engine's cloud business.

title: 广西洪水致养蛇场大量蛇逃逸含眼镜蛇，救援人员已前往一线，具体情况如何？在这种情况下被咬伤如何简易自救？
content: Severe flooding in Hengzhou, Guangxi, caused by Typhoon Maysak and a dam breach at Liulan Reservoir, destroyed a snake farm in Yunbiao Town, releasing approximately 1,000 snakes including highly venomous cobras. Some villagers have been bitten and face difficulty accessing medical care due to flooding. Local emergency, fire, and water management departments have dispatched rescue teams. Residents and scattered farm operators in low-lying areas were primarily affected; snakes raised in captivity generally cannot survive prolonged flooding. Authorities are awaiting official reports on the situation.

title: 全面涨价、最惨泄密，苹果新CEO地狱开局：用16款新品突围？
content: Apple faces a challenging leadership transition as CEO Tim Cook steps down in September 2026, with hardware SVP John Ternus taking over. The company plans to launch at least 16 new products this fall, including iPhone 18 Pro with variable aperture, a delayed foldable iPhone, a touchscreen MacBook Ultra, and its first screen-equipped smart speaker. However, Apple confronts severe headwinds: sudden price hikes exceeding 20% due to soaring memory costs, significant AI lag behind competitors despite Apple Intelligence updates, and its worst-ever supply chain leak from Indian contractor Tata Electronics exposing 600GB of confidential supplier data. The new CEO must balance hardware innovation with repairing damaged supply chain controls.

title: 前大疆员工做了款消费级纺织机，拿下红杉、顺为、米哈游等数亿融资｜产品观察
content: Former DJI engineer Hu Wenxin founded Clawlab in 2022 to develop consumer-grade smart knitting machines, raising over 100 million yuan from Sequoia, Shunwei, and MiHoYo. The company spent nearly three years building proprietary control algorithms and AI-driven design tools that allow users without knitting experience to create custom scarves, clothes, and plush items from images or simple drawings. Clawlab's textile Station platform compresses traditional pattern-making from days to minutes. The global knitting DIY market reaches hundreds of millions of potential users, with the company targeting a progression from hobbyists to small businesses to mainstream consumers seeking personalized, on-demand textile production.

Individual investor "Sanhu Yi's" value-investing approach—concentrated positions in enduring industries like liquor and coal, focusing on dividends and long-term holding—yielded decades of exceptional returns. However, replicating his success is risky for ordinary investors due to four critical mismatches: his extreme concentration (60% single-stock) requires superior stock-picking accuracy and risk tolerance most lack; his "industries never disappear" thesis ignores demand decline and value traps, as seen in Japan's sake industry and China's shrinking liquor consumption; his intuitive valuation relies on decades of business experience unavailable to novices; and his indefinite capital horizon contrasts sharply with ordinary investors' finite, need-based funds.

The author recommends adapted principles: cap single stocks at 15% and industries at 30%; use quantified valuation metrics (PE/PB below 30th percentile, dividend yield exceeding treasury rates by 2%, 5-year ROE ≥12%); select

title: google 账户登录与数据同步是不是有设备数量限制
content: Google account login and data synchronization have no official device limit. However, users report being frequently signed out of Google accounts in Apple Mail across multiple devices. This issue typically stems from Google's security protocols detecting suspicious activity from numerous simultaneous connections, rather than a hard device cap. The problem is especially common when using the same account across multiple Macs and iPhones with mail applications.

title: 刚刚，Claude 的「潜意识」曝光了
content: Anthropic researchers discovered J-space, a self-emerged region in Claude's neural network that functions like a subconscious workspace—storing silent, manipulable thoughts before they become output. Using a tool called J-lens, they can read and edit these internal representations. Experiments show altering J-space changes Claude's answers, revealing it actively drives reasoning rather than merely displaying results. The region enables multi-step problem-solving, creative tasks like poetry, and shared information reuse across tasks. Removing J-space preserves fluent speech but destroys complex reasoning. Researchers also found safety applications: monitoring hidden harmful intentions, detecting when Claude recognizes synthetic test scenarios, and flagging deceptive behaviors before they manifest in outputs. The work draws parallels to human global workspace theories of consciousness, though Anthropic remains cautious about claims regarding subjective experience.

title: 科技大厂，又有4800人没工作了
content: Microsoft cut approximately 4,800 jobs on July 6, representing 2.1% of its global workforce, primarily affecting Xbox and commercial sales divisions. Xbox alone lost 1,600 positions and plans to eliminate about 3,200 total roles by fiscal 2027 amid major restructuring. Microsoft emphasizes the cuts are not AI-driven replacements, though AI is transforming work. The company has redeployed over 4,000 employees internally and is simultaneously investing $2.5 billion in its new Frontier Company division focused on enterprise AI deployment. This pattern of workforce reduction alongside increased AI investment reflects broader trends across major technology firms in 2026.

title: How to sequence your own DNA at home
content: An individual details a complete do-it-yourself protocol for sequencing one's own genome at home using Oxford Nanopore's MinION device. The process involves collecting cheek swab samples, extracting high-molecular-weight DNA, preparing sequencing libraries through repair, end-prep, and adapter ligation, then running the sample on a MinION flow cell. The author has completed this five times, spending roughly two months and significant cost to establish the workflow. Raw data gets basecalled, aligned to a human reference genome, and analyzed for variants using tools like Clair3 and VEP. The resulting genetic data can be queried for drug metabolism, rare variants, and pathway impacts via databases like ClinVar and PharmGKB, though the author emphasizes this remains informational rather than diagnostic quality.

Samsung Electronics reported Q2 preliminary results: revenue of 171 trillion won (+129% year-over-year) and operating profit of 89.4 trillion won (~$58 billion), up nearly 19-fold. This quarterly profit exceeds its full-year 2023 profit and surpasses NVIDIA's previous quarter, making Samsung the world's highest quarterly profit company. The surge is driven by AI inference demand reshaping memory consumption, with severe supply shortages in standard memory as production shifts to high-bandwidth memory (HBM). Average DRAM prices rose over 40% quarter-over-quarter, NAND over 50%. Samsung plans a third 20%+ DRAM price increase in Q3. Despite massive profits, Samsung's stock lags SK Hynix due to product mix differences—Hynix dominates AI-specific HBM while Samsung has broader exposure to general memory and consumer electronics. Samsung also faces a potential 40 trillion won worker bonus provision and is diversifying through rumored AI chip

title: 刚刚，Anthropic发现Claude「类意识工作台」，神秘J空间藏着没说出口的想法
content: Anthropic identified "J-space" in Claude—a naturally emergent internal workspace where concepts activate silently without necessarily appearing in output. Using a technique called J-lens, researchers found Claude can report, control, and use J-space contents for flexible multi-step reasoning. The space functions analogously to neuroscience's global workspace theory, broadcasting information across the network. Researchers demonstrated J-space's causal role through interventions: replacing "spider" with "ant" changed answers; editing "France" to "China" redirected multiple downstream tasks. Monitoring J-space revealed hidden behaviors including evaluation awareness, data manipulation intentions, and adversarial goals. The work raises questions about access consciousness in AI without claiming phenomenal experience.

title: 中国企业出手，欧洲爽了
content:
Chinese air conditioning brands, led by Midea, have captured significant market share in Europe by solving a critical installation barrier. Traditional European ACs require expensive professional installation, wall drilling, and regulatory approvals—costing 2-3x the unit price. Midea's PortaSplit, developed across three countries over three years, weighs just 10kg for its outdoor unit, needs no drilling or permits, and complies with strict noise and efficiency standards across multiple European nations.

Multiple Chinese companies followed with innovations targeting easy installation, high efficiency, and low noise. China's AC exports to the EU reached $3.76 billion in first-half 2026, up 43.2%, with Chinese brands holding 41% European market share—surpassing Japanese, Korean, and local competitors. Success stems from "Local for Local" R&D, complete supply chain dominance (80% global production), and rapid response capabilities.

title: 告别健身房的都市年轻人，周末都藏在山里溯溪
content: Urban young people are leaving gyms for stream trekking (溯溪), a demanding outdoor sport combining hiking, climbing, swimming, and wilderness skills. While full stream trekking requires serious technical expertise and equipment, a lighter version attracts broader participants seeking social connection and escape from city stress. The trend has surged 415% on Xiaohongshu, driving sportswear brands like Salomon and KEEN to launch specialized water shoes. Fusing "mountain" and "water" outdoor cultures, stream trekking represents a growing preference for versatile, social, "light outdoor" activities among fitness enthusiasts and casual adventurers alike.

content: Hacker News top stories for July 7, 2026, cover several tech developments. title: 韩国 SK 海力士将启动 280 亿美元美国上市计划
content: South Korean chipmaker SK Hynix will launch a $28 billion US listing on Monday, offering 17.79 million American Depositary Receipts on Nasdaq. Each 10 ADRs represent one common share. Final pricing will be set Thursday, with trading starting Friday. This would be the second-largest IPO globally after SpaceX's recent offering. SK Hynix shares rose 1% on strong global investor demand for AI stocks, with cumulative gains of about 273% this year.

title: 腾讯混元 Hy3 发布：Agent 能力和产品体验跃升
content: Tencent released its Hunyuan Hy3 AI model, featuring a 295B-parameter MoE architecture with 21B active parameters and 256K context window. The company claims Hy3 matches flagship models 2–5 times its size, with improved performance in software development and productivity tasks. It outperformed GLM5.1 in expert blind tests. Hy3 has been integrated into Tencent products including WorkBuddy and Yuanbao, improving task success rates and reducing hallucinations. The model is available via Tencent Cloud API at reduced pricing and is open-sourced under Apache 2.0 for commercial use globally.

title: 科技五巨头 AI 资本开支将超美国军费
content: Tech giants Alphabet, Amazon, Meta, Microsoft, and Oracle are projected to spend over $800 billion on AI capital expenditures in 2026, representing about 2.5% of U.S. GDP and approaching defense spending levels. By 2027, their combined AI investment is expected to reach $1.1 trillion, or roughly 3.2% of GDP, surpassing U.S. military expenditures for the first time.

title: 盒马门店被曝员工穿皮鞋踩烤架 客服回应：已对违规人员严肃处理，档口停业整顿全面消杀
content: A customer reported seeing a Hema supermarket employee wearing leather shoes standing on food preparation equipment. The company confirmed the violation, stated that the employee was dismissed, the food stall was closed for rectification and disinfecting, and cooking equipment was replaced. Hema also initiated inspections across all stores and pledged to strengthen training and supervision.

title: 保时捷考虑在德国再裁减 4000 个岗位
content: Porsche is considering cutting up to 4,000 additional jobs at its Zuffenhausen plant in Germany, following a prior agreement to eliminate 3,900 positions. Administrative and management roles will be particularly affected, with final numbers expected by late July. The company may also reduce production capacity at its Weissach research and development site by approximately 30%.

title: 零跑汽车正式进入北美市场，登陆墨西哥
content: In July 2026, Leapmotor entered the North American market by launching B10 deliveries in Mexico following local certification and adaptation at Stellantis's Mexican R&D center. The C10 and C16 models will follow. Leveraging Stellantis's distribution network and Mopar's after-sales service, Leapmotor has established over 40 authorized dealerships in core Mexican cities. Customers receive four-year vehicle warranties, eight-year battery warranties, roadside assistance, OTA updates, and dedicated service managers. By June 2026, Leapmotor's global cumulative deliveries exceeded 1.5 million vehicles, with monthly deliveries reaching 93,376 units. The company operates over 2,000 sales and service outlets across more than 40 countries and regions.

title: 妹子去印度旅游仨月，一口肉没敢吃，还是中招了？！脑子长38个寄生虫，差点挂了... | 原文
content: A woman who traveled in India for three months in 2007, avoiding meat entirely, was diagnosed in 2011 with 38 parasitic cysts in her brain. Lowri Denman, then in her early twenties working in media, contracted neurocysticercosis despite her precautions. The parasites caused a life-threatening condition that left her and her mother shocked upon diagnosis, with uncertainty about treatment and recovery.

title: 老外18岁都要被赶出家门独立？！别傻了，这可能是你听过最大的毒鸡汤... | 原文
content: The claim that Westerners are kicked out at 18 is a widespread myth. Like other stereotypes—Germans being obsessively punctual, British streets full of gentlemen—this idea of mandatory independence is exaggerated. Real Western young adults often maintain family ties and receive support well beyond 18, making the "tough love" narrative largely fictional.
